name: PER_WORKFORCE_X
query: SELECT PDS.WORKER_NUMBER, PAF.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, A.ORGANIZATION_ID, PAF.PERSON_ID, A.ASSIGNMENT_ID, PAF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PAF.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, PAF.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PAF.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, PAF.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, A.VENDOR_ID, A.VENDOR_EMPLOYEE_NUMBER, A.VENDOR_ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER, A.VENDOR_SITE_ID, A.PO_HEADER_ID, A.PO_LINE_ID, NAME.FULL_NAME FULL_NAME, NAME.FIRST_NAME FIRST_NAME, NAME.MIDDLE_NAMES MIDDLE_NAMES, NAME.LAST_NAME LAST_NAME, NAME.PRE_NAME_ADJUNCT PRE_NAME_ADJUNCT , A.LOCATION_ID LOCATION_ID, SUP.MANAGER_ID SUPERVISOR_ID, SUP.MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID SUPERVISOR_ASSIGNMENT_ID, A.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, A.DEFAULT_CODE_COMB_ID DEFAULT_CODE_COMB_ID, PDS.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE, A.PROJECT_TITLE PROJECT_TITLE, A.BILLING_TITLE BILLING_TITLE, EMAIL.EMAIL_ADDRESS, A.EXPENSE_CHECK_ADDRESS, A.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE, PAF.ATTRIBUTE1 ATTRIBUTE1, PAF.ATTRIBUTE2 ATTRIBUTE2, PAF.ATTRIBUTE3 ATTRIBUTE3, PAF.ATTRIBUTE4 ATTRIBUTE4, PAF.ATTRIBUTE5 ATTRIBUTE5, PAF.ATTRIBUTE6 ATTRIBUTE6, PAF.ATTRIBUTE7 ATTRIBUTE7, PAF.ATTRIBUTE8 ATTRIBUTE8, PAF.ATTRIBUTE9 ATTRIBUTE9, PAF.ATTRIBUTE10 ATTRIBUTE10, PAF.ATTRIBUTE11 ATTRIBUTE11, PAF.ATTRIBUTE12 ATTRIBUTE12, PAF.ATTRIBUTE13 ATTRIBUTE13, PAF.ATTRIBUTE14 ATTRIBUTE14, PAF.ATTRIBUTE15 ATTRIBUTE15, PAF.ATTRIBUTE16 ATTRIBUTE16, PAF.ATTRIBUTE17 ATTRIBUTE17, PAF.ATTRIBUTE18 ATTRIBUTE18, PAF.ATTRIBUTE19 ATTRIBUTE19, PAF.ATTRIBUTE20 ATTRIBUTE20, PAF.ATTRIBUTE21 ATTRIBUTE21, PAF.ATTRIBUTE22 ATTRIBUTE22, PAF.ATTRIBUTE23 ATTRIBUTE23, PAF.ATTRIBUTE24 ATTRIBUTE24, PAF.ATTRIBUTE25 ATTRIBUTE25, PAF.ATTRIBUTE26 ATTRIBUTE26, PAF.ATTRIBUTE27 ATTRIBUTE27, PAF.ATTRIBUTE28 ATTRIBUTE28, PAF.ATTRIBUTE29 ATTRIBUTE29, PAF.ATTRIBUTE30 ATTRIBUTE30, PAF.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, NAME.LIST_NAME GLOBAL_NAME, NAME.LIST_NAME LIST_NAME FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F PAF, PER_PERSONS PERSONS, PER_PERSON_NAMES_F_V NAME, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M A, PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE PDS, PER_EMAIL_ADDRESSES EMAIL, PER_ASSIGNMENT_SUPERVISORS_F SUP WHERE PAF.PERSON_ID = PDS.PERSON_ID AND PAF.PERSON_ID = A.PERSON_ID AND PERSONS.PERSON_ID = PAF.PERSON_ID AND NAME.PERSON_ID = PAF.PERSON_ID AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN PAF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND PAF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN A.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND A.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND A.PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' AND A.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE IN ('E','C') AND A.PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID = PDS.PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID(+) AND PDS.PRIMARY_FLAG(+) = 'Y' AND EMAIL.EMAIL_ADDRESS_ID(+) = PAF.PRIMARY_EMAIL_ID AND A.ASSIGNMENT_ID = SUP.ASSIGNMENT_ID(+) AND A.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE BETWEEN SUP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+) AND SUP.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+) AND SUP.PRIMARY_FLAG(+) = 'Y' AND A.EFFECTIVE_LATEST_CHANGE = 'Y' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN NAME.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND NAME.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
